feature: Mandatory Swarm Tracking for Background Agents
description: Add PreToolUse hook on Agent tool to enforce HEXFLO_TASK tracking, harden SubagentStart, fix stderr visibility, and add audit trail. ADR-2603221939.

phases.name: PreToolUse hook on Agent tool
phases.description: Add Agent matcher to settings.json hooks, implement hex hook pre-agent in hook.rs. Background agents without HEXFLO_TASK exit(2). Foreground agents get advisory warning. Exempt: Explore, Plan, claude-code-guide.

tasks.name: Add pre-agent hook handler to hook.rs
tasks.description: Add PreAgent variant to HookEvent enum. Implement pre_agent() function that reads stdin JSON (prompt, subagent_type, run_in_background). For background agents: check prompt contains HEXFLO_TASK:{uuid} regex, validate uuid format. Exit(2) to block if missing. For foreground: warn to stdout. Exempt agent types: Explore, Plan, claude-code-guide.

tasks.name: Add Agent matcher to settings template
tasks.description: Add Agent PreToolUse matcher to hex-setup/mcp/hex-claude-settings.json and hex-cli/assets/templates/hex-claude-settings.json. Matcher: { "matcher": "Agent", "hooks": [{ "type": "command", "command": "hex hook pre-agent", "timeout": 3000 }] }

tasks.name: Validate task exists in active swarm
tasks.description: In pre_agent(), after extracting HEXFLO_TASK uuid, GET /api/hexflo/tasks/{id} to verify the task exists and belongs to an active swarm. If nexus unreachable, degrade to advisory (warn but don't block). If task not found, exit(2).

phases.name: Harden SubagentStart
phases.description: Add ownership validation, lazy agent connect, and heartbeat to SubagentStart hook.

tasks.name: Validate task ownership in SubagentStart
tasks.description: Before assigning task to agent, check if task.agent_id is already set and differs from current agent. If so, warn but proceed (task reassignment is valid for retries). Log the reassignment.

tasks.name: Lazy agent connect in SubagentStart
tasks.description: If session state has no agent_id when SubagentStart fires, call POST /api/hex-agents/connect to register before assigning the task. This closes the lazy-registration gap where subagents spawn before the first UserPromptSubmit.

tasks.name: Send heartbeat on SubagentStart
tasks.description: Call send_heartbeat() at the start of subagent_start() so the parent agent doesn't go stale during long-running subagent work. Currently heartbeats only fire on UserPromptSubmit.

phases.name: Fix stderr visibility
phases.description: Change pre_bash warnings from eprintln! to println! so Claude can see and act on them.

tasks.name: Change pre_bash warnings to stdout
tasks.description: In pre_bash(), replace eprintln! with println! for destructive command warnings. Claude cannot see stderr — only the human terminal sees it, making these warnings useless for AI enforcement.

phases.name: Workplan context propagation
phases.description: Inject parent workplan context into subagent prompts via pre-agent hook.

tasks.name: Inject HEXFLO_WORKPLAN into agent prompt context
tasks.description: In pre_agent(), read workplan_id from session state. If present, output HEXFLO_WORKPLAN:{id} as context that SubagentStart can capture. Store alongside current_task_id in session state. SubagentStop includes workplan_id in task completion payload.

phases.name: Retroactive audit command
phases.description: Add hex agent audit to detect untracked work by cross-referencing git log against HexFlo tasks.

gate.command: cargo build -p hex-cli --release && cargo test -p hex-cli

tasks.name: Add hex agent audit command
tasks.description: Add Audit variant to AgentAction. Read git log --oneline -20, fetch completed tasks from /api/hexflo/tasks. Cross-reference: commits with Co-Authored-By that don't match any task result are flagged as 'dark agents'. Display report with commit hash, message, and whether it's tracked.

success_metrics: Background Agent tool calls without HEXFLO_TASK are blocked (exit code 2)
Foreground Agent tool calls without HEXFLO_TASK get advisory warning
Explore/Plan/claude-code-guide agents are exempt from tracking
hex agent audit detects commits not mapped to HexFlo tasks
SubagentStart sends heartbeat to prevent parent stale detection
dependency_order: P1 (tier 0) → P2 + P3 (parallel, tier 1) → P4 (tier 2) → P5 (tier 3)
